task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: All requirements met: (1) RenameRequest struct in api/types.go with Source and Destination fields properly json-tagged; (2) Client.Rename method in api/client.go POSTs to /api/rename; (3) Server.RenameHandler in server/routes.go correctly copies model via CopyModel(), removes source manifest and layers, returns 404 on source not found (os.IsNotExist), returns 409 Conflict if destination exists; (4) Route registered as r.POST("/api/rename", s.RenameHandler); (5) CLI command with cobra using ExactArgs(2) and correct Use format; (6) CLI RenameHandler creates RenameRequest and calls client.Rename(); (7) No test files modified, only core implementation files changed. Implementation is complete and correct.
